name: shopping_journey

observed_strengths.observation: Frictionless PDP -> cart -> checkout in 3 clicks with no errors and add-to-cart confirmed via /cart.js
Checkout offers Express checkout (Shop Pay / PayPal / wallets) above the standard email+address form, plus a discount-code field
Nine payment methods detected including Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay — broad wallet coverage
Checkout pre-checks 'Email me with news and offers', capturing marketing consent during purchase

missing_or_weak.observation: No cart upsell or free-shipping progress nudge anywhere in the journey (cart_upsell_present false) despite a $50 free-shipping threshold
No urgency or scarcity elements (stock counts, timers) present in the journey

purchase_path_notes: PDP -> /cart -> /checkout completes in 3 clicks with add-to-cart verified and the standard Shopify secure checkout reached (form-filling stopped at entry); the flow is friction-free but does nothing to lift basket size en route.
